Colorado Day Camps

Mountain Explorers Day Camp

Hosted by the Boulder Outdoor Education Center.

A week of hiking, climbing, and paddling for kids who love the outdoors.

Ages 6-12 $425 per week June 9-13, 2026 1234 Trailhead Way, Boulder, Colorado, CO 80301 Register now

Registration opens March 1, 2026 and closes May 15, 2026.

Lunch and snacks are included every day.

Questions? Email camps@avid4.com or call (303) 555-0142.

Follow us on Instagram at https://instagram.com/avid4adventure.

This is a drop-off day camp with a SPORTS and NATURE focus.

Campers get to keep a reusable water bottle from our sponsor.
